task_summary: Add SP7 fixture-driven multi-fixture companion bundle output with static manifest, bundle CLI mode, README usage, deterministic ordering/grouping, missing-fixture coverage, and focused tests.
notes: Mew implemented SP7 with --model gpt-5.5. Codex acted as operator/reviewer/verifier only. The first write batch reached the right bundle shape but verifier failed because missing-fixture CLI error handling produced a traceback instead of a stable stderr line; the batch rolled back. A repaired retry then hit the same-file write-batch guard and a later compact retry timed out under high session context pressure. After rejected old pending writes were cleared and model-timeout was raised to 180 seconds, mew authored the final one-edit-per-file patch and the focused verifier passed with 22 tests. No Codex product-code rescue was used. Existing issue #3 already covers the repeated same-file write-batch ergonomics; the retry-timeout pressure is separate M6.16 polish input.
